narrative: Price and news data remain unavailable for a second consecutive day: outbound HTTPS to CoinGecko and Binance is blocked by the cloud environment network policy, and no finished coindesk_com spider jobs exist in Scrapy Cloud project 864818. worth_watching: Network policy blocks financial data APIs (coingecko.com, binance.com) — configure allowed egress or add a COINGECKO_API_KEY to unlock the Demo tier
